text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Traveling Morioka Festival.
Yukino Bijin invites me to come, and I arrive to
find Gold City and Curren Chan already here.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for com'n, everyone! Let's have heaps
and heaps of fun today!
choice_data_list: Good luck with the taiko drumming.
Good luck with the taiko drumming.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we'll be cheering for you. I gotta say, this
space is much bigger than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, it is pretty big, come to think of it... It
looks like they put in a lot of work to prepare for
my big day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Take a deep breath, Yukino. You've put in so
much practice. You'll be fi—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeeeeech!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Oh no! The speakers!

text_block_list.name: Customers
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, technical difficulties? Yikes.
Aw, man. Wanna go somewhere else?

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Argh! Oh no... All our efforts're gonna go t'waste!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... And after you work'd so hard, Yukino... It's
all my fault... I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hey...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! We're gonna be A-OK, even if we
don't have a big fancy stage or work'n speakers.

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Both our belov'd Morioka and the sansa odori are
meant to be enjoyed without anyth'n fancy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what I'm sayin' is... you're in good hands!
Leave the rest to me!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm a bundle of nerves, but... here goes
noth'n!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Da-dum! Da-da-dum! Clack, clack!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sakkora! Choiwa yasse!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Is that the sound of taiko drums?
What's this? Traveling Morioka Festival? Sounds
interesting!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, City. I've got a great idea on how to hype
this up further! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Funny you say that. I have an idea as well.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I-isn't that Gold City and Curren Chan?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sakkora choiwa! ☆ Yasse! ♪

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text: She's so cuuute! I wanna try!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Join in. You can just copy us as best you can.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(G-Gold City and Curren Chan! And even the
trainer! A-all right... I gotta go even harder!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: O-okay, ev'ryone! Aaalllll togeth'r now!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Jinkies! Business was a-boom'n, thanks to you!
Thanks a million!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No thanks nec'ssary! All I did was lose mys'lf in
the taiko drum. You should be thank'n City and
th'others for danc'n.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? Without your
drumming, the whole thing would've be a
non-starter.
choice_data_list: I agree. It's all thanks to your hard work.
I agree. It's all thanks to your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were so cute playing the taiko drums that
everyone just wanted to cheer you on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again. Ev'ryone went along with
you b'cause you never gave up.

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
We had a picture perf'ct ending. And it's all
thanks t'you. You worked hard'r than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-you're all too kind!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Ehehe! Thank you all... so much...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Phew, sorry about that! I was bawl'n like a baby
back there! But I'm fine now!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, shall we head back?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, I had a close call today. Yet again,
you nearly took my breath away completely.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yet again?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I'm saying you're more incredible than you give
yourself credit for.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Uhhh.. huh? City...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, you three! Hurry up or you'll be left
behind! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah! Okay! Coming!
